title: MobVote Crabs!
description: Making the Wilder Wilds Crabs look like the Mob Vote Crabs!
body:
## The Idea!
During the 2023 Mob Vote the most amazingest and bestest Mob ever concieved was offered to us; _THE CRAB_! With a whole new awesome extend mechanic, and the absolute pure cuteness of this adorable crustacean won me over immediately!
Unforunetly the Crab didn't win the 2023 Mob Vote, the Armadillo won (...stupid.) and the adorable & glorious Crab is now left to rot with all the other Scrapped ideas of cool and interesting Mobs & Biome Updates...
BUT NOT ANYMORE! Playing with a few recent updates to one of the best mods I've ever played, Wilder Wild! They've made my small and fragile dreams come true and have added the Crab to their mod! The Crab however was all orange in the mod and as much as I loved him still, I liked the fun little blue boy... :3

And that's how I got this whole idea to retexture the current Wilder Wild Crab to match the Mob Vote 2023 Crab, nothing major it just changes the texture of The Crab itself & The Bucketed Crab! I hope this small blue boy puts as much joy on your face as it does mine!

## The Crab!
![The Crab Retextures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b75b9479c3d76ec2487997a3b4fc7e4131af1611.jpeg)

![The Wild Crabs!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc50c6549040a92ea8b55396f98c9916332fe163.jpeg)

I hope you enjoy my tiny little resource pack! <3
